reviews.review_text: I can't complete the game's achievements as they're locked behind DLCs which no longer exist

I don't know what DLC i own of what was available. Nor is all of the DLC for this game available in the expansion.

Ignore the price. Just that alone is a perma-boycott of Paradox. They're making people re-buy what they already own.

People really are not happy because they can't buy DLC for a game they own. Think about that. People want to give money to Paradox, but they refuse to take it.

Plus, if you had to remove all DLC for a game and remove it's ability to be purchased. To then re-release it with a promise it includes all existing DLC, but doesn't. Then the new product needs to be worth the money. Is the new content worth $40? No. This is coming from a person that owned all of the DLC for the original game. They just pissed off all of the people that buy their DLC in hopes of getting new people on board to buy DLC. To top it off, you can't even verify if someone owned the DLC since it's completely removed from the store. So you have no clue if your friends owned the DLC or not. They should be kicked off of Steam.


Also,
In 2021 I told Paradox to create Surviving Moon. 5 years later, they still haven't. And they have maybe 2-3 years left before we land on the moon again. Instead of announcing a Surviving Moon game, they pull this ♥♥♥♥.

So this was a big fat lie.

'Discount Eligibility: An automatic discount of $20 on the standard price $39.99** (discounted price $19.99) will be applied to your purchase of the base game Surviving Mars: Relaunched if the original Surviving Mars is already in your library. The discount will only be applied if you are purchasing it on the same platform and using the same account as your original purchase. The offer cannot be applied across platforms.'

They forgot to mention the discount was for a limited time.

Paradox Interactive are a band of cheaters!
I've bought the original. I purchased some of their DLCs and I've been waiting for annouced updates and fixes... it never came! I have to buy the game AGAIN??? No! I've already bought it!!!

I was scammed. The product I bought was deleted without a notice. If refund is denied will put time and effort to file a legal complaint. 

This the first time I made a use of "ignore this publisher" option. Never again. And I mean it - will mark all employees that can be listed and will be wary of anyone that employs them in the future.
They removed the option for me to buy missing DLC for the original game. You have to buy the "remastered" version again. Absolutely disgusting money grab.

Nie ma jak to usunąć nie tylko grę, ale także opcję kupna DLC dla graczy już posiadających oryginał.

Nothing like removing not only the game itself, but also the ability to purchase DLC's for the people already with the game.

Pirate this game. Greedy piece of trash company wants us to repurchase a game we already own in order to have the DLC. They would've had my money today for all of the DLC I missed while I unable to play this game for some year due to having a life, just to find out they delisted it all and rereleased the entire game. If I want the DLC I missed I would have to pay another $40 for the same game, except apparently, it's completely broken according to the reviews. Pirate it or play any other sim game, screw this company.

Like others, I believe charging people for a new game that they've already bought, instead of, at most, asking a small fee for the upgraded fee, is ridiculous.  I will be joining the boycott of Paradox games until they decide to make this right, meaning making it essentially an upgrade and refunding every purchaser's money for the difference.  I have removed Prison Architect 2 from my wishlist, and will make sure from now on that I know if Paradox is involved with any game I'm interested in.  If so, I will pass.  It's a shame too, because I like many of their games.  I was really looking forward to PA2.  Do better.
Owners were blocked from buying the DLC and forced to buy the game again at full price if they want to get any of the expansions. Not happening, Paradox. F you.

It seems as if the publishers are choosing to make this game harder to access as folks have less and less spare cash around the world. Instead of marginally priced DLC's, they've locked the game behind a new paywall, gatekeeping access to DLCs to those who already own. Paradox has been molting its hull for quite some time to reveal the locust that it is; devouring everything in its path at the cost of all that is good. Gross.

Over 400 hours played on Linux. Pretty fun game. The last couple expansions are described as fairly broken by reviewers, so I wait for them to get fixed before considering to buy them. Instead of fixing the buggy releases, the game is relaunched as a new full price title, only for Windows, and the original game is removed from the shop. — You really outdid yourself.

I am deeply disappointed with my purchase and I regret re-buying the same game i already owned.
I feel SCAMMED by a company that I thought I loved.

Imagine making a handful of really, really, really well made games and then re-releasing one of those knock-outs with a fresh coat of paint and a few additions, but the game's plagued with bugs and you're now forever more locked out of buying the only working copy of said game.

Does it sound like a contextual paradox to re-release a game worse than you initially released it, made DLC for, and then put out patches for? You'd be correct, because it IS a Paradox Game. Get it? Ha Ha Ha GET IT?

♥♥♥♥ you Paradox. I love this game, and I can never EVER even recommend it to people because you released a busted version and then ♥♥♥♥♥♥ the working one right off the platform. What the ♥♥♥♥ is wrong with you? I'm seriously asking.
The removal of this product and its DLC regardless of if you purchased it is another reason to not buy a paradox game.
They removed the DLC from original game to force you to buy the new remaster broken version... shame on you!
Fun, Easy to understand, Beautiful colors, and nice structure

Tbh , playing a lot of pdx grand strats, they all get the love they deserve,
this game was already dead a few years back, after they made the "relaunch" this is even more dead, they really expect me to to spend more money to get a "decent" version of th game i already paid for....
Ridicolous.

I liked this game a lot and was super excited about the Relaunched version coming out - then it came out for a fat $40 price tag, no discounts or anything for people who own the original. Full of bugs. Not even remotely worth the price.

That's fine, though, whatever. Except - they've now delisted the original. I've also just now learned they ran a stealth discount deal after the fact! 50% off if you own the original for the upgrade. That's rad, right? I'd pay $20 for it, that's kind of what I expected - except what is this? This stealth launched discount APPARENTLY also expired on May 10th! 8 days before I found out about it from this game's page! And it STILL lists the discount notice here, no notes that it was going to expire!

It didn't even warrant a NEWS bump to let people know this was available, I guess, so now the thing that was going to redeem it just squeaked on by in the night.

Genuinely took a great game that let you do something as wonderful as terraforming Mars and turned it into an absolute joke. Don't give them your money on this version or the Relaunched - they just don't deserve it.
delisting this and forcing new people to buy the relaunch, which is still buggy, is quite scummy.
Absolutely fantastic game if you like slow logical build up.
I agree with the other reviewers about what paradox did. I'm not giving them more money for a game and DLC I already bought.
Delisted old version, and no discount for the new version (for owners of old version).

Surviving Mars is a propaganda piece for the Martian agenda of Musk and Zubrin. Nothing resembling it will ever happen, but put that out of your brain and it's a wonderful game. Shame it got killed by Relaunched, the original with no DLC can be really fun.
Fairly thorough and thought out game with respect to progression and complexity. Can be on the grind sometimes
evil company doing a greedy harvesting from charging unreasonable price on the 2025 relaunched version to the loyal fans of the 2018 version

So I paid the game and I cant play the game...
Refund me
what's with these long as* tutorial games? Make a game that's fast to get into
Paradox becoming the most greediest company rivaling ea
I wouldve given this game a good solid 7 or 8 out of 10 but then they decided to rereleased the game and make you rebuy it to get the new dlc and improverments which is absurd
Terrible, just terrible, the publisher should be ashamed of what they have dopne to their customers. no DLC? for a game i own?? who does that?

Went to redownload the game and found I can no longer play any of the DLC's that I spent around $80 on. Absolutely despicable considering they expect us to pay another $40 to play a "remastered" version that does absolutely nothing new and fixes nothing. Do not buy from this "publisher".

Another clunky, half baked disappointment from Paradox.
I should have known better.
Fun game lots of replayaility

Being forced to buy the new game & removing DLC.  


Tim Robinson voice: **CASH GRAB**
What an incredibly stupid company Paradox has become.
great game thats all i have to say

I have this game for a while now, with a few DLC's. I wanted to download again, get some more DLC's (I want to test out below and beyond) but seems like everything has dissapeared from the store. 

Why?
♥♥♥♥ game .
ruined by paradox's greed
Love the game.
WHAT !!?
hi paradox, ♥♥♥♥ you!
x
